summary: RM Price Upload + Margin feature tested end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed against external URL. Frontend: All new data-testids present and integrations working — Price History tab on RM Repository (template + upload + stats + avg price + invoice history), BOM Cost column on Buyer SKU table, Derived BOM Cost emerald panel inside View BOM dialog with full RM breakdown, and Margin Report tab on Reports page (totals + per-SKU margin colour coding + Apply + Export visible).
critical_code_review_comments: rm_price_routes.py is well-structured (single 547-line module, no DRY violations).

compute_avg_prices() uses $last on an unsorted $group — Mongo $last is unordered without explicit $sort, so 'latest_price' may not actually be the latest; if business needs true latest_price, sort by date inside the pipeline (e.g., {$sort: {date: 1}} before $group). Currently latest_price is exposed in /avg-prices items.
DELETE /api/rm-prices/history is a hard-delete with no auth/role guard — recommend protecting with admin role or moving to a confirm-token pattern.

Upload endpoint accepts 'mode' (append/overwrite) but does NOT dedupe on (invoice_no, vendor_id, rm_id) — re-uploading the same file in append mode will produce duplicates and skew the rolling average. Consider an upsert key.

/bom-cost-bulk loops sequentially with one DB lookup per SKU (buyer_skus + common_bom + brand_bom each call). For 2000 SKUs this is ~6000+ round-trips. Consider batch fetching common_bom/brand_specific_bom once.

Margin report's per-row total_cogs uses bom_cost * total_qty — fine, but bom_cost is itself rounded to 4 dp before multiplication; small qty-driven rounding drift possible on very large totals (acceptable for reporting).
_rolling_window_start uses 30*months days (approx) — acceptable for a 3-month rolling MA, but document this in UI (already partially shown via 'Rolling window start' label).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new testids verified, BOM dialog & Margin tab integrations working)

seed_data_creation: Test added 2 valid invoice rows (TEST_INV_001/002) for the first available vendor+RM during upload test. RM price history grew from 10 → 12 records during the run. Existing AD_KS_BE_010 BOM-cost (Rs 625) and 2-row margin report verified intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RM Price Upload feature endpoints live at /api/rm-prices/* (template, upload, stats, avg-prices, history, bom-cost/{id}, bom-cost-bulk, margin-report, DELETE history). Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_rm_prices.py — set REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env when invoking pytest manually. Test SKU AD_KS_BE_010 currently returns total_cost=625.00 with 5/37 RMs priced. Margin report has 2 sample rows: KM_SC_BN_001 (no BOM cost yet -> 100% margin) and AD_KS_BE_010 (22.84% margin). Frontend testids confirmed: price-history-tab, bom-cost-<buyer_sku_id>, view-bom-<buyer_sku_id>, bom-cost-panel, total-bom-cost, margin-tab.
rca of the issue: No bugs — feature works as designed.
